user.title: Set up View-Aware Polling
user.description: This adds View-Aware Polling. After setup, use the **Add** buttons on the integration to pick an **integration**, a **device** or an **entity** to make view-aware. Each one stops polling in the background and refreshes only while you are actually looking at it: on its device page, when you tap it to open the popup, or while you are viewing a dashboard that shows it.

abort.already_configured: View-Aware Polling is already set up.

user.title: Make an integration view-aware
user.description: Make every device and entity of an integration view-aware (for example Proxmox VE or TP-Link). It stops polling in the background and refreshes only while you are looking at it.

data.only_when_shown: Only refresh on a dashboard that shows it

data_description.target: The integration whose devices and entities you want to make view-aware.
data_description.only_when_shown: Off (recommended): refresh whenever any dashboard is open, plus its device page and popup. On: on dashboards, only refresh while the open dashboard actually shows it.
data_description.interval: Leave empty to use each target's own native polling interval. Set a value only to force a fixed rate while it is on screen.

data.only_when_shown: Only refresh on a dashboard that shows it

data_description.only_when_shown: Off (recommended): refresh whenever any dashboard is open, plus its device page and popup. On: on dashboards, only refresh while the open dashboard actually shows it.
data_description.interval: Leave empty to use each target's own native polling interval. Set a value only to force a fixed rate while it is on screen.
